Getting Started

Welcome to My Docs! This guide will help you get up and running quickly.

Prerequisites

Before you begin, make sure you have the following installed:

  • Node.js version 18 or higher
  • npm or yarn package manager

Installation

Install the package using your preferred package manager:

npm install my-docs-package

Basic Usage

Once installed, you can import and use the package:

import { createClient } from 'my-docs-package';

const client = createClient({
  apiKey: 'your-api-key',
  baseUrl: 'https://api.example.com',
});

const result = await client.fetch('/endpoint');
console.log(result);
Info

Make sure to keep your API key secret. Never commit it to version control.

Warning

This feature is experimental and may change in future versions.

Configuration Options

The client accepts the following configuration options:

Option Type Default Description
apiKey string required Your API authentication key
baseUrl string https://api.example.com The base URL for API requests
timeout number 5000 Request timeout in milliseconds

Next Steps
